about.title: DTG – Your Digital Technology Partner
about.description1: DTG is proud to be one of the leading system integrators in Vietnam, providing a comprehensive IT solution ecosystem: Information Security, Data Infrastructure, Cloud Computing, and advanced Network & System Administration.
about.description2: With a team of experienced experts holding top international certifications, partnering closely with world-leading technology companies, we are committed to delivering optimal, secure, and superior solutions.

network.heading: AI-Powered Network Security
network.desc: Securing everyone and everything from the latest threats in every location. Built for Zero Trust and powered by AI, the Strata™ Network Security Platform proactively monitors, analyzes and prevents sophisticated threats in real time with less complexity, enabling secure growth and innovation for your organization.

secops.heading: AI-Driven Security Operations
secops.desc: Transform the SOC and enable better, faster security with the #1 AI-driven SecOps platform powered by unified data, artificial intelligence and automation.

cloud.heading: Real-Time Cloud Security
cloud.desc: Secure cloud apps, data and infrastructure from code to runtime. Protect cloud-native environments with continuous visibility, posture management, runtime defense and AI-powered risk prioritization.

identity.heading: Next-Generation Identity Security
identity.desc: Control identity chaos across every human, machine and AI agent. Discover, govern and secure every identity with contextual intelligence that keeps access aligned to risk.
